message:
test(ipc): add wa-16hou LabRuntime deterministic tests for IPC Cx-aware primitives

8 LabRuntime tests in ipc::tests::labruntime_ipc exercising the
Cx-aware IPC channel primitives and pure-data type contracts under
deterministic virtual-time scheduling:

1. mpsc_recv_state_value — Value delivered under LabRuntime Cx
2. mpsc_recv_state_disconnected — Disconnected on sender drop
3. mpsc_recv_state_cancelled — Cancelled Cx surfaces Cancelled variant
4. shutdown_pending_on_closed_channel — true on channel close
5. shutdown_not_pending_on_cancelled_cx — false on Cx cancel (pins
   ProudSalmon's 2026-04-01 fix under deterministic scheduling)
6. ipc_response_serde_roundtrip — JSON-line protocol contract
7. ipc_auth_token_validation — token scope + unknown-token rejection
8. ipc_request_serde_roundtrip — Status variant survives encode/decode

All 93 ipc::tests pass (85 existing CompatRuntime + 8 new LabRuntime).
benches/ipc_throughput.rs already pre-exists (15K LOC).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
